[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A close-up image shows a person’s torso and hips with a handwritten blue text overlay near the upper left.

Main Subject: The camera focuses on a person wearing light blue shorts or short pants, with their hands positioned near the waist area, partially visible at the top right and top center. The person’s upper body is cropped out above the waist, leaving only the lower torso, waistline, and upper thighs in view.

Setting: The background is a plain light/white surface with no clear indoor or outdoor context. Lighting appears even and flat, with no visible shadows.

Visual Details: The shorts are light blue with darker blue horizontal striping. The person’s skin tone is visible around the waist and hands; the hands appear to be holding or adjusting the waistband area. The image is framed tightly so the person occupies most of the center and right side. A large blue handwritten-style text overlay reads “Maaf baru bangun” placed in the upper left area, with the letters outlined in a darker blue and filled in lighter blue.

Visible Text: Maaf baru bangun

Practical Summary: The image shows a cropped view of a person adjusting light blue striped shorts at the waist. Blue handwritten text appears on the upper left of the image.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Maaf baru  
bangun

# Structured Version

## Text (as shown)
- Maaf baru  
- bangun

# Notes
None.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
